data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that an email copy is auto-sent to the signatory, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality, nor are there any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the requirement is satisfied. The absence of concrete evidence regarding the email functionality indicates a clear gap in coverage for this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of email copy auto-sent to signatory functionality or related API endpoints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for email functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the email copy auto-sent requirement.
